notes: Based on Ground Floor Furniture Plan and Partition Plan — Rubenius Interior Wellbeing. All weights are approximate walking steps between zone centers. Update after physical walk-through.

entrance.label: Main Entrance
entrance.description: Main entry point from outside the building

reception.label: Reception
reception.description: Reception desk with Polaris star ceiling installation and merchandise display

merchandise_display.label: Merchandise Display
merchandise_display.description: Lobby display cabinets with campus memory items

radial_classroom.label: Radial Classroom
radial_classroom.description: Semi-circular high-impact lecture and fireside chat space

creator_lounge.label: Creator Lounge
creator_lounge.description: Informal brainstorming and prep area outside the studio

wormhole.label: Innovation Lab (Wormhole)
wormhole.description: Innovation and build space with transition tunnel entrance

utility.label: Utility Area
utility.description: Kitchen and service area behind cafeteria

corridor_main.label: Main Corridor
corridor_main.description: Central walkway connecting all ground floor zones

lift.label: Lift
lift.description: Lift / elevator access to all floors

edges.instruction: Walk straight through the main entrance toward the reception desk.
The merchandise display is right beside you in the lobby.
From reception, walk ahead into the main corridor.
Continue along the corridor and turn left for the Radial Classroom.
Walk along the corridor and you will see the Creator Lounge on your right.
The Creator Studio is directly through the Creator Lounge.
The Mentor Room is off the main corridor. It is access controlled.
Head toward the back of the floor — you will hear the arcade before you see it.
The cafeteria is toward the far end of the corridor on your left.
The kitchen and utility area is directly behind the cafeteria.
Continue to the far end of the building and look for the tunnel entrance — that is the Wormhole.
The staircase is along the corridor to reach upper floors.
The lift is near the staircase along the main corridor.
The cafeteria is just next to the arcade area.
From the Radial Classroom, head back along the corridor toward the Creator Lounge.
From the Wormhole, head back and the arcade is to your right.

calibration_notes.instructions: Manav — walk each edge below and count your actual steps. Replace the weight values above with real step counts. One weight unit = approximately 5 normal walking steps.
